positive: Minimalist geometric design featuring a majestic soaring raven silhouette, incorporating vibrant jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) and contrasting gold foil accents. The raven is positioned centrally against a stylized, abstract lunar landscape composed of overlapping circular patterns and clean, sharp lines. The overall composition should evoke a magical, cosmic forest feel, suitable for a t-shirt print. Strong contrast is essential. Style: Flat vector graphic mixed with elegant linework and cosmic art influences. Lighting: Highly contrasting, deep shadows, glowing highlights. Focus on clean edges, strong silhouettes, and symmetry. High detail, print-ready resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, amateur, grainy, messy, noise, cluttered, illegible
